title: FailureMode entity (ONT-E-10)
description: A characterized failure mode of a component, system, or subsystem. Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (NEVER additionalProperties — Pitfall #1). The severity enum mirrors AircraftSystem.criticality_level (5-value FAR/CS 25.1309 set: catastrophic, hazardous, major, minor, no_safety_effect) so failure-mode severity and system criticality are directly comparable. Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. MUST be the literal string 'FailureMode'.

affected_component.description: URI of the Component, Subsystem, or AircraftSystem entity exhibiting this failure mode.

failure_description.description: Free-text description of the failure mode (≥20 chars). Empty / placeholder descriptions fail validation by design.

conditions.description: Operating conditions under which this failure mode is observed or hypothesized. All sub-fields optional; if present, free-text strings (e.g. altitude='above FL250', airspeed='Vmo+10kt', configuration='gear-down', environmental='icing').

airspeed.description: Airspeed regime or specific speed (e.g. 'low-speed approach', 'Vmo+10kt', 'transonic').

severity.description: Failure severity per FAR/CS 25.1309 5-value classification. Aligned with AircraftSystem.criticality_level enum domain so failure-mode severity and system criticality are directly comparable.

detection_method.description: Optional. How the failure is detected (e.g. 'BIT', 'crew observation', 'scheduled inspection', 'flight-data anomaly').

effects.description: Effects of the failure on system / aircraft / mission. ≥1 item required.
